description: The TriangleDiagnosticMeshes component is used to show where a triangle is in the world. This is usually used as a debug tool.

fields.TriangleIndex: The index of the triangle on the mesh to make a diagnostic for.
fields.Vertex0Color: The vertex color of vertex 0 for this diagnostic mesh.
fields.Vertex1Color: The vertex color of vertex 1 for this diagnostic mesh.
fields.Vertex2Color: The vertex color of vertex 2 for this diagnostic mesh.
fields.VertexColorProfile: The color profile of the input Colors of ``Vertex0Color``, ``Vertex1Color``, and ``Vertex2Color``.
fields.Displace: How much to displace the triangle's position by it's normal (front face direction)
fields.Mesh: The mesh to make a diagnostic for.
